title: Prove cumulative bit encoding constraints are necessary and sufficient
description: The Delegation circuit enforces cumulative bit invariants (bit 4 implies bits 2+3, bit 3 implies bit 2) on the delegatee scope. Formally verify two properties: (1) SOUNDNESS — no witness satisfying the circuit constraints can violate the implication rules, and (2) COMPLETENESS — every valid cumulative encoding is accepted. Write a standalone test harness that exhaustively checks all 2^8 permission byte values against the circuit constraints and confirms exact agreement with the SDK's validateCumulativeBitEncoding(). This also catches any off-by-one in bit indexing between Circom (LSB-first Num2Bits) and the Solidity/TS layer.
